question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Dorea is feeling:

Dorea was trying to cook a Baklava. When she took it out of the oven, the Baklava was ruined as the bread was not crispy, and the filling was bursting all over the pan. At that moment, her daughter came home and noticed her mom's fresh yet ruined Baklava. She tasted it and gave a thumbs-up to her mother.

What emotion is Dorea experiencing?
subject: emotion_transition
scenario: Dorea was trying to cook a Baklava. When she took it out of the oven, the Baklava was ruined as the bread was not crispy, and the filling was bursting all over the pan. At that moment, her daughter came home and noticed her mom's fresh yet ruined Baklava. She tasted it and gave a thumbs-up to her mother.

Read this scenario and identify the emotion Simon is feeling:

Simon, an amateur painter, had been working on a portrait of his deceased pet for over a week. After he finally completed it, he stepped back and immediately noticed that he had painted the wrong color for his pet's fur. Just then, his wife saw it and exclaimed, "That's exactly how I remember him!"

What emotion is Simon experiencing?
subject: emotion_transition

Albert and his dad made a deal. If Albert managed to graduate, being in the top 5 in the school, his dad would buy him a new laptop. If Albert lost, then he would not get anything. Read this scenario and identify the emotion Jane is feeling:

Jane's mother is very strict and always undermines her accomplishments at home. One day, Jane showed her mother the test paper on which she had scored 95 points out of 100. Her mother only said that she should have gotten full marks on such a simple test. However, when other parents are present, she openly talks about Jane's grades and excitedly praises her daughter.

What emotion is Jane experiencing?
subject: unexpected_outcome
scenario: Jane's mother is very strict and always undermines her accomplishments at home. One day, Jane showed her mother the test paper on which she had scored 95 points out of 100. Her mother only said that she should have gotten full marks on such a simple test. However, when other parents are present, she openly talks about Jane's grades and excitedly praises her daughter.

question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Shawn is feeling:

Angie and Shawn are a very close couple, but they haven't been on the best terms for the last two weeks. Today is the 28th. On this day of every month, Shawn would buy a bouquet of flowers and put them in the living room to express his love for Angie. As Shawn passed by the flower shop, he started pondering deeply, and after some time, he walked in to buy a bouquet.

What emotion is Shawn experiencing?
subject: unexpected_outcome
scenario: Angie and Shawn are a very close couple, but they haven't been on the best terms for the last two weeks. Today is the 28th. As Shawn passed by the flower shop, he started pondering deeply, and after some time, he walked in to buy a bouquet.

question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Victoria is feeling:

The result of the hard chemistry test is finally out today. Victoria found out that, while she didn't pass the test, she earned a higher score than Bertha, her rival.

What emotion is Victoria experiencing?
subject: unexpected_outcome
scenario: The result of the hard chemistry test is finally out today. Victoria found out that, while she didn't pass the test, she earned a higher score than Bertha, her rival.

question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Andre is feeling:

Andre is a doctor. Due to the constant emergencies happening in the past few months, Andre hasn't had the time to be with his girlfriend. So, this weekend, he decided to take his girlfriend on a romantic date night. Nearing the end of the main course, he got a call from his friend at the hospital telling him to enjoy the night.

What emotion is Andre experiencing?
subject: unexpected_outcome
scenario: Andre is a doctor. Due to the constant emergencies happening in the past few months, Andre hasn't had the time to be with his girlfriend. question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Harvey is feeling:

Today was a hectic day for Harvey. He woke up late to go to the office, skipped his breakfast, got scolded by his manager, had to work late, and ate one meal only. When he came home, he wanted to get to bed immediately when he saw his parents' morning text that he had been unable to check until now, wishing him the happiest birthday and leaving heartfelt messages.

What emotion is Harvey experiencing?
subject: unexpected_outcome
scenario: Today was a hectic day for Harvey. He woke up late to go to the office, skipped his breakfast, got scolded by his manager, had to work late, and ate one meal only. When he came home, he wanted to get to bed immediately when he saw his parents' morning text that he had been unable to check until now, wishing him the happiest birthday and leaving heartfelt messages.

question:
Read this scenario and identify the emotion Zhongli is feeling:

To celebrate moving into his new house, Zhongli hosted a housewarming party and invited one of his best friends, Ollie. Around 6 p.m., Ollie arrived at Zhongli's house and entered without taking off his shoes. Seeing this, Zhongli told him to take off his shoes and offered a pair of slippers to use inside the house.

What emotion is Zhongli experiencing?
subject: cultural_value
scenario: To celebrate moving into his new house, Zhongli hosted a housewarming party and invited one of his best friends, Ollie. Around 6 p.m., Ollie arrived at Zhongli's house and entered without taking off his shoes. Seeing this, Zhongli told him to take off his shoes and offered a pair of slippers to use inside the house.
